goal: Flywheel golden signals — determine if knowledge is compounding or collecting noise

test_levels.rationale: L0 for pure math (gini, regression), L1 for fixture-based signal computation, L2 for CLI integration

ag-hb2.2.title: Implement golden signal computation and tests

ag-hb2.3.title: Wire golden signals into CLI (--golden flag)

ag-hb2.4.title: Update flywheel skill docs with golden signals

cross_cutting_constraints: Backward-compatible: existing FlywheelMetrics JSON must not break
Golden signals opt-in via --golden flag only (pm-002)
Tests must assert behavioral correctness, not just presence
